content: Postgres p99 8ms at 2k QPS; single writer at 60% CPU during peak; storage growing ~40GB/month
Team of 6; deep Postgres experience; nobody has operated DynamoDB in production
DynamoDB provisioned-capacity quote lands at ~2.1x current RDS spend at projected year-2 scale, before caching
80% of queries are key-value by tenant id; 20% are ad-hoc relational reports the finance team runs weekly
A compliance launch is due in 5 months; the migration window would overlap its final quarter
